sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23990" key="delfi/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δελφίν</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῖνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, later form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δελφίς</foreign> (q. v.).</entryFree>
